reasoning: BC Hydro excluded Tesla from its EV charger rebate program on March 12, 2025, as a retaliatory political measure directed specifically at Elon Musk and U.S. tariffs. Premier David Eby's strong public rhetoric ("wanna throw up") indicates deep political commitment to this policy, making a political reversal highly unlikely before the July 1, 2025 resolution date, which is just 1 month away from the forecast date. Furthermore, there is no evidence of a successful lawsuit from Tesla that would force an injunction. The explicit mention of Tesla on the rebate webpage serves both as a political statement and practical guidance to limit customer support inquiries, significantly raising the probability that the text will still be present on the page when checked in July.
